creator: satz@iranger.com
text:
After running 4.1.1 from either floppy or generic kernel, the adaptec ahc bios 1.1 cannot perform a scsi inquiry command. Powering off the hardware and back on allows the adaptec ahc bios to work and the scsi devices are discovered.

Fix: 

work around is to power off and back on.
How-To-Repeat: run 4.1.1 using an ahc device and reboot. System cannot find any disks to boot from.
